class.name: CassieEdgeCollider
class.brief_description: Discrete-proximity edge-edge collision between a stroke curve and a [CassieSurfacePatch] — ENG-55.
class.description: Samples the input curve at fixed arc-length spacing, then for each stroke segment scans every mesh-edge candidate against [method Geometry3D.get_closest_points_between_segments]. When the closest distance is below [member proximity_threshold], emits a penetration record describing the push direction and depth. Per-frame discrete check (not CCD); the downstream solver path converts each record into a position constraint.

method.name: find_penetrations
method.description: Returns an Array of Dictionary records — one per penetrating sample — with [code]sample_t[/code] (parameter along [param curve]), [code]stroke_point[/code], [code]mesh_point[/code], [code]displacement[/code] (the push from mesh toward stroke), and [code]penetration_depth[/code].

members.member: The obstacle patch the collider tests against.
Penetration is reported when the stroke-segment to mesh-edge distance falls below this value.
Total stroke samples to test along the curve. Higher values catch tunneling between coarse samples; lower values are cheaper.
